name: Effects of intermittent senolytic therapy on bone metabolism in postmenopausal women: a phase 2 randomized controlled trial
summary: 2024 Nature Medicine phase 2 randomized controlled trial of intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in 60 postmenopausal women, reporting a null primary bone-resorption endpoint, transient P1NP increases, no serious adverse events, and exploratory stronger signals in participants with higher baseline senescent-cell burden.
